title: Loops Coding
description: Coding challenges using for and while loops including loop control with break and continue.
subject: Programming

content.prompt: Write a program that uses a for loop to count from 1 to 10 and prints each number.
content.starterCode:

# ...
# 10

print("Counting complete!")

content.prompt: Create a password validation system that keeps asking for a password until the user enters the correct one ('python123').
content.starterCode:
correct_password = "python123"
attempts = 0
max_attempts = 3

# TODO: Use a while loop to ask for password
# - Keep track of attempts
# - If password is correct, print "Access granted!" and exit
# - If max attempts reached, print "Access denied!"
# - For wrong password, print "Incorrect password. Try again."

print("Password Security System")

# Your while loop here

testCases.expected:
Password Security System
Incorrect password. Try again.
Access granted!

Password Security System
Incorrect password. Try again.
Incorrect password. Try again.
Incorrect password. Try again.
Access denied!
